listing.name: AuthiChain Product Verification API
listing.tagline: Blockchain-backed product authenticity verification in real-time

endpoints: GET  /verify              — Verify a product by ID
POST /verify              — Verify with optional NFC hash
POST /verify/batch        — Batch verify up to 50 products
submissionChecklist: 1. Create RapidAPI provider account at rapidapi.com/provider
2. Click 'Add New API' → select 'Import OpenAPI Spec'
5. Configure pricing tiers: Basic (Free/100), Pro ($49/1K), Ultra ($199/10K), Mega ($499/100K)
6. Add API description, logo, and category from this file
8. Test each endpoint from the RapidAPI playground
9. Submit for review → typically approved within 24-48 hours
